inputs: position and time data are accurate
sensory_synthesis.interpretation: The system appears to be functioning normally with the exception of the current readings, which may indicate an issue with the propellers or thrusters.

internal_deliberation.thought: The current readings suggest a potential problem with the propellers or thrusters, which could lead to a loss of control if not addressed promptly.

mission_assurance_check.failure_mode_prediction: The anomaly could result in a loss of control if the issue with the current readings is not resolved.
mission_assurance_check.mitigation_strategy: Perform a system check to verify the propellers and thrusters are functioning correctly. If the issue persists, initiate a manual override to maintain control.

decision.expected_outcome: The system check will confirm if the issue is with the propellers or thrusters and allow for appropriate action to be taken.

agent_reasoning.self_reflection: The anomaly detected requires immediate attention to ensure the safety of the mission. A system check is the most prudent action to take at this time.
